name: BigCommerce
one_liner: BigCommerce is an e-commerce platform that provides a comprehensive suite of REST and GraphQL APIs for managing storefronts, product catalogs, orders, and customer data.
api_notes: The API supports both REST (v2 and v3) and GraphQL. The documentation is extensive and covers core store objects including products, orders, customers, and store settings.
auth_notes: V3 APIs utilize OAuth 2.0 (access tokens passed via X-Auth-Token header), while older V2 APIs use API keys.
access_notes: Developers can sign up for a free BigCommerce trial store to access the control panel and generate API credentials.

evidence.claim: BigCommerce provides REST and GraphQL APIs to manage products, orders, customers, and store settings.
Search citation: BigCommerce Product API Guide for Developers
Search citation: BigCommerce System and API Integration Capabilities | Americaneagle.com

mcp_notes: There is an official MCP server provided specifically for interacting with the BigCommerce developer documentation (https://docs.bigcommerce.com/_mcp/server).
